sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ كَرِيمٌ قِطَّةً صَغِيرَةً أَمَامَ بَابِ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Karim je pronašao mačića ispred kućnih vrata.
sentences.translationEn: Karim found a small cat in front of the house door.

sentences.translation: Mačka je bila gladna i izgledala je uplašeno.
sentences.translationEn: The cat was hungry and looked frightened.

sentences.arabic: أَحْضَرَ كَرِيمٌ لَهَا الطَّعَامَ وَالْمَاءَ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Karim joj je brzo donio hranu i vodu.
sentences.translationEn: Karim quickly brought her food and water.

sentences.translation: Porodica je odlučila brinuti se o mački i uzgajati je.
sentences.translationEn: The family decided to take care of the cat and raise it.
